Package neqsim.process.diagnostics

package neqsim.process.diagnostics
Equipment-level operational diagnostics and root cause analysis.

This package integrates process simulation, multi-source reliability data, plant historian time-series, and STID design conditions to diagnose equipment issues using a Bayesian-inspired methodology:

  1. Prior — OREDA failure mode frequencies set initial hypothesis probabilities
  2. Likelihood — historian data evidence updates hypothesis scores via trend analysis, correlation, threshold exceedance, and rate-of-change detection
  3. Verification — process simulation confirms if a hypothesized failure reproduces observed symptoms by cloning the process, applying perturbations, and comparing KPIs

Main entry point is RootCauseAnalyzer. Typical usage: 

 RootCauseAnalyzer rca = new RootCauseAnalyzer(processSystem, "Compressor-1");
 rca.setSymptom(Symptom.HIGH_VIBRATION);
 rca.setHistorianData(historianMap, timestamps);
 RootCauseReport report = rca.analyze();
 System.out.println(report.toTextReport());

Post-Trip Analysis

For automated post-trip workflows, this package also provides:

  • TripEvent — immutable data class representing a detected trip
  • TripEventDetector — monitors process equipment parameters and detects trip conditions
  • FailurePropagationTracer — traces how a failure cascades through the process
  • RestartSequenceGenerator — generates optimised restart sequences after a trip
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process
     
    neqsim.process.diagnostics.restart
    Restart sequence generation and optimisation after process trips.
  • Class
    Description
    EvidenceCollector
    Analyzes historian and STID data to collect evidence for or against each hypothesis.
    FailurePropagationTracer
    Traces how a failure propagates through a process flowsheet.
    FailurePropagationTracer.PropagationResult
    Result of a failure propagation trace.
    FailurePropagationTracer.PropagationStep
    A single step in the failure propagation chain.
    FailurePropagationTracer.PropagationStep.ImpactLevel
    Impact level of a propagation step.
    Hypothesis
    A ranked root-cause candidate produced by root-cause analysis logic.
    Hypothesis.Builder
    Builder for Hypothesis.
    Hypothesis.Category
    Category of root cause.
    Hypothesis.Evidence
    A single piece of evidence for or against a hypothesis.
    Hypothesis.EvidenceStrength
    Strength of a piece of evidence.
    Hypothesis.ExpectedBehavior
    Expected direction or event type for a diagnostic signal.
    Hypothesis.ExpectedSignal
    Expected historian, STID, or simulation signal for a hypothesis.
    HypothesisGenerator
    Generates ranked root-cause hypotheses from equipment type, symptom, and reliability data.
    RootCauseAnalyzer
    Main orchestrator for root cause analysis of equipment issues.
    RootCauseReport
    Encapsulates the result of a root cause analysis for an equipment issue.
    SimulationVerifier
    Verifies root-cause hypotheses by perturbing a cloned process model.
    SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult
    Result object for a simulation perturbation attempt.
    Symptom
    Observable symptoms that trigger root cause analysis.
    TripEvent
    Represents a detected trip event on a piece of process equipment.
    TripEvent.Severity
    Severity level of a trip event.
    TripEventDetector
    Detects trip events during dynamic or steady-state simulation by monitoring process parameters against configured thresholds.
    TripEventDetector.TripCondition
    A single trip condition: monitors one parameter on one equipment against a threshold.
